source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Soft editorial English UI with Japanese typography guidance for knowledge headings, search, citations, table numerals, command palettes, dense research notes, review states, and quiet approval flows.
layout: Calm 8px product grids, cascading tendril texture bands, compact knowledge dashboards, citation tables, structured navigation, restrained soft shadows, and 8px cards and controls.

prompts.label: Transparent lion's mane fungus motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #00ff00 chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a lion's mane fungus, isolated complete subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: One full Hericium erinaceus lion's mane fungus fruiting body with cascading cream-white tendrils, soft shaggy tooth-like spines, subtle ivory caps, warm shadow-brown recesses, faint hardwood forest tan undertones, accurate fungal texture and clustered organic form; no log, no moss, no forest floor.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; do not crop the tendrils; show the full rounded cascading form with natural irregular edges.
Lighting/mood: clean soft studio light that preserves cream tendril detail, ivory highlights, warm shadow-brown depth, and tactile softness.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no hardwood forest landscape, no decorative background, no second fungus, no animals, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lions Mane light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create one complete high-resolution 4K design-system source board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Lions Mane", derived from the visible isolated lion's mane fungus cutout. This is not a thumbnail or social image; it must be a production reference board.
Canvas and resolution: exact 16:9 landscape board at 3840 x 2160 pixels. Fill the whole 3840 x 2160 canvas with a precise grid. Do not output a smaller preview. Keep labels large and readable at gallery scale.
Reference use: Use the visible lion's mane fungus motif as the source of truth. Extract cream-white cascading tendrils, ivory highlights, warm shadow-brown recesses, hardwood forest umber, fine tooth-spine texture, soft clustered rhythm, and quiet scholarly warmth. Use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals from those colors.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lions Mane, Lions Mane, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: cream tendril background, ivory surface, warm tan secondary, shadow brown ink, hardwood umber primary, soft beige muted fields, pale gold focus rings, toasted brown charts, mushroom-gray borders.
Typography: soft knowledge product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use a calm humanist sans plus a refined editorial serif for note headings, and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, search, citations, table numerals, and research workflows. Include short Japanese labels such as 資料, 検索, 記録, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, knowledge graph, line chart, bar chart, research table, citation table, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, restrained icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, tendril texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, token chips.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn product design system, quiet research workspace, soft knowledge base dashboard, ivory surfaces, hardwood umber primary actions, shadow-brown typography, cream tendril texture bands, precise 8px cards and controls, compact readable data density, restrained soft shadows, no nested UI cards.
Text: short readable labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Lions Mane", no tiny illegible text.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lions Mane dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Lions Mane". It must feel like the same soft knowledge system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible lion's mane fungus motif and the visible light-mode board.
Canvas and resolution: exact 16:9 landscape board at 3840 x 2160 pixels. Fill the whole canvas with a precise product UI grid. Keep labels large and readable.
Reference use: Use the visible lion's mane fungus and light-mode board as references. Preserve cream tendril highlights, ivory text, hardwood umber primary controls, shadow-brown depth, pale gold focus rings, tendril texture, 8px radius language, compact dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, and English plus Japanese typography guidance.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lions Mane, Dark Mode, Lions Mane, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: deepest shadow-brown background, warm charcoal-brown panels, hardwood umber primary, toasted tan charts, cream tendril foreground, ivory highlight surfaces, pale gold focus rings, mushroom-gray borders, and restrained near-neutrals derived only from the motif.
Typography: soft knowledge product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use a calm humanist sans plus a refined editorial serif for note headings and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, search, citations, table numerals, and research workflows. Include short Japanese labels such as 資料, 検索, 記録, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, knowledge graph, line chart, bar chart, research table, citation table, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, restrained icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, tendril texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, token chips.
Visual details: dark background derived from the fungus shadow recesses, elevated panels in warm brown-black, cream foreground text, hardwood umber primary actions, pale gold focus rings, toasted tan charts, subtle cascading tendril texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Lions Mane", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
